title: Last Chance -- NO VOTE
content:
Once again, I'm issuing a plea to all readers. Please make time this Sunday. Get out there and make it clear to Thaksin that *democracy is not about a-couple-of-second-in-a-voting-booth*.

!-https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/misc/novote_banner.png!

Sunday, April 2, 2006 from 8:00 AM to 3:00 PM

And I've to say this once again. _If he manages to come back, I'll be there to sign *the petition to remove him* again!_
